Line 325:  WriteLiteral(@"></div>
Line 326:  <style>
Line 327:      .t-grid-content tr > td:hover .menu_block + .display_menu {
Line 328:          display: block !important;
Line 329:      }
Line 330:  
Line 331:      .display_menu {
Line 332:          left: 65px;
Line 333:          overflow: visible;
Line 334:          position: absolute;
Line 335:          top: -5px;
Line 336:          background: #fff;
Line 337:          border: 1px solid #ddd;
Line 338:          z-index: 100;
Line 339:      }
Line 340:  
Line 341:      .t-grid-content tr > td {
Line 342:          overflow: visible !important;
Line 343:          position: relative;
Line 344:      }
Line 345:  
Line 346:      .display_menu > ul {
Line 347:          padding: 0 16px;
Line 348:      }
Line 349:  
Line 350:      .display_menu li {
Line 351:          list-style: none outside none;
Line 352:          width: 143px;
Line 353:      }
Line 354:  </style>
Line 355:  <script");

Line 384:

Line 386:  
Line 387:  BeginContext("~/Views/Touchpoint/FindTouchpointResult.cshtml", 3370, 1228, true);
Line 388:  
Line 389:  WriteLiteral(@">
Line 390:      $(function () {
Line 391:          jQuery.noConflict();
Line 392:          $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog({
Line 393:              autoOpen: false
Line 394:          });
Line 395:          $('#popup').bind('dialogclose', function (event) {
Line 396:              window.location.replace(window.location.href);
Line 397:          });
Line 398:      });
Line 399:      function CloseMe() {
Line 400:          $(""#genericPopup"").dialog('close');
Line 401:          //$("".t-icon .t-refresh"").trigger('click');
Line 402:  
Line 403:          window.location.replace(window.location.href);
Line 404:      }
Line 405:  
Line 406:      function OpenEmailDialog(ac) {
Line 407:          jQuery.noConflict();
Line 408:  
Line 409:          $.get(""/WrongContact/Index"", { accessCode: ac }, function (data) {
Line 410:  
Line 411:              $(""#EmailDialog"").html(data);
Line 412:              $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog({
Line 413:                  width: 1200,
Line 414:                  height: 1000,
Line 415:              });
Line 416:              $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog('open');
Line 417:          });
Line 418:      }
Line 419:      $('#menu_block').hover(function () {
Line 420:          // alert(""call"");
Line 421:          $('#display_menu').show();
Line 422:      }, function () {
Line 423:          $('#display_menu').hide();
Line 424:      })
Line 425:  
Line 426:      $('#menu_block').mouseenter(function () {
Line 427:          $('#display_menu').show();
Line 428:      }).mouseleave(function () {
Line 429:  
Line 430:          $('#display_menu').hide();
Line 431:  
Line 432:      });
Line 433:  
Line 434:      function openEditPopup(id) {
Line 435:          $.get(""");
Line 436:  
Line 437:  EndContext("~/Views/Touchpoint/FindTouchpointResult.cshtml", 3370, 1228, true);

Line 454:          });
Line 455:  
Line 456:          $(""#genericPopup"").dialog({ height: 600, title: ""Edit/Correct"" });
Line 457:          $(""#genericPopup"").dialog('open');
Line 458:      }
Line 459:  
Line 460:      function openRemovePopup(id,  name) {
Line 461:  
Line 462:  
Line 463:  
Line 464:          alertify.set({
Line 465:              labels: {
Line 466:                  ok: ""No"",
Line 467:                  cancel: ""Yes""
Line 468:              },
Line 469:              buttonFocus: ""cancel""
Line 470:          });
Line 471:          // button labels will be ""Accept"" and ""Deny""
Line 472:          alertify.confirm(""You are about to Remove  : "" + name + "". Are you sure you want to do this?"", function (e) {
Line 473:              if (e) {
Line 474:                  // Click no
Line 475:              } else {
Line 476:                  // click yes
Line 477:  
Line 478:                  $.get(""");

Line 572:  WriteLiteral("\" + id, function (data) {\r\n            $(\"#genericPopup\").html(data);\r\n        })" +
Line 573:  ";\r\n        $(\"#genericPopup\").dialog({ height: 600, title: \"View Detail\" });\r\n  " +
Line 574:  "      $(\"#genericPopup\").dialog(\'open\');\r\n    }\r\n\r\n\r\n</script>\r\n\r\n");
Line 575:  
Line 576:  EndContext("~/Views/Touchpoint/FindTouchpointResult.cshtml", 6564, 227, true);
Line 577:  
Line 578:          }
Line 579:      }
Line 580:  }
